name: Seven Networking UK
notes:
AS201335 is Seven Networking's primary ASN.

Seven Net is your premier provider of blazing fast fiber optic internet without the need for a modem.

With Seven Net, your business and home gain access to our cutting-edge fiber optic infrastructure for an internet experience that can't be beat.

Our robust global network delivers IP Transit with low latency to customers across the globe.

For our customers in China, we offer a superior internet experience compared to standard Chinese ISPs through our premium network.

Our premium IP transit to China also outperforms much of the competition.

We are open for peering at Internet Exchanges worldwide.

AS-SET: AS201335:AS-All(RIPE)

Prefix Limited: 100000 IPv4, 10000 IPv6
